response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify song title '特者生存ワンダラダー!!' and performer Amane Kanata from on-screen text. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics. 3. Confirmed the song is by Amane Kanata. 4. Mapped the video into two scenes based on the transition from music to talking. 5. Adjusted the end time of the second scene to match the video's actual end duration (05:01.915). 6. Extracted and structured the required data into the final JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance by the VTuber Amane Kanata of the song 'Tokusha Seizon Wanderlader!!' followed by a short talking segment.

scenes.description: Amane Kanata performs the song 'Tokusha Seizon Wanderlader!!' on a stage with vibrant lighting and holographic effects.
scenes.song_title: 特者生存ワンダラダー!!
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なぬっ!? ビシッ! おりゃっ! パシッ!
ツッコミも冴えて
本日快晴

沙哇! 扑通! 蹦蹦! 啪嚓!
手にする全部 It’s mine!
くれくれ

適度にがんばろっか (そっか?)
そんなんだっていいけどさ

必死にがんばろっか (そうだ!)
それが僕らしいよな

そんで貧乏っちい じゃねえんだわ!
うん! 万事がパッチリ
イケてるに決まってる! (are you?)

かなたちゃん (are you?)
どどん! 前進上等!
ちゃんと歓迎して (wonder-la-der-la)
高まれ

開空創造
ちゃんと驚嘆して (wonder-la-der-la)
興奮しよう

僕が言うんだもん
本当にするんだもん
現実超えろ未来 あー!
弱点も平気
スイッチでランチャー! (wonder-la-der-la)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Nanupp!? Bishitt! Oryatt! Pashitt!
Tsukkomi mo saeteru
Honjitsu kaisei

Sawa! Putton! Bonbon! Pashitt!
Te ni suru zenbu It’s mine!
Kure kure

Tekido ni ganbarokka (sokka?)
Sonna n datte ii kedo sa

Hisshi ni ganbarokka (souda!)
Sore ga boku rashii yo na

Sonde binbotchii ja nee n da wa!
Un! Banji ga patchiri
Iketeru ni kimatteru! (are you?)

Kanata-chan (are you?)
Dodonn! Zenshin joutou!
Chanto kangei shite (wonder-la-der-la)
Takamare

Kaikuu souzou
Chanto kyoutan shite (wonder-la-der-la)
Koufun shiyou

Boku ga iu n da mon
Hontou ni suru n da mon
Genjitsu koero mirai aa!
Jakuten mo heiki
Suitchi de ranchaa! (wonder-la-der-la)

scenes.description: The performance ends, and Amane Kanata talks to the audience, reflecting on the song and her graduation event.
